arrowEmail1.author: Arrow
arrowEmail1.subject: Q3 Budget Error
arrowEmail1.body:
Glass,
Your Q3 budget report appears to have errors. The total of the Amount column under Allocated Funds does not match the total of the Budget column under Quarterly Expenses. Please fix this ASAP as we are already late on submitting this.
Arrow
Project GRATER Chief Engineer
arrow@agno.com
